info.name: Ledger-Core API
info.description:
**New flow:** Auth > Signup → Verify → Login → Get current user. If no workspace, run **Businesses > Create business**. Then **Flow - start from scratch**.

All protected endpoints inherit Bearer auth from the collection. Webhook stays unauthenticated.

Prerequisites: server running (`npm run dev --prefix server`), migrations applied, select Ledger-Core - Local environment.

Amounts are kobo (NGN x 100). Webhook triggers async reconciliation (customer lookup → match → ledger).

item.name: Auth
item.description: Authentication endpoints. Run Signup → Verify → Login → Get current user. If no workspace, use Businesses > Create business before the main flow.

request.description: Creates user account and sends verification email. Does not create a business — use Businesses > Create business after login if /auth/me has no workspaces.
Paste the token from the verification email link. In dev, check server logs or email inbox.
Authenticates and saves accessToken + refreshToken to environment.
Returns user profile and workspaces. Auto-sets businessId from first workspace.
Rotates refresh token and issues new access token.
Sends password reset email. Always returns 200 to prevent email enumeration.
Paste the token from the password reset email.

item.name: Businesses
item.description: Workspace onboarding. Signup creates the user only; create a business here before customers/obligations if GET /auth/me returns an empty workspaces array.

request.description: Lists businesses the authenticated user belongs to. Auto-sets businessId from the first workspace.
Creates a workspace tied to NOMBA_SUB_ACCOUNT_ID from server env.

item.name: Flow - start from scratch
item.description: Run Auth > Login first (and Businesses > Create business if needed). Then run steps 1-19 in order. Test scripts save customerId, obligationId, obligationReferenceCode, and VA details.

request.description: Calls Nomba to provision a VA. Requires sandbox credentials in server .env.
Paginated payment events for the business (dashboard transactions feed). Run after step 9 webhook.
All obligations including PAID. Optional filters: status (UNPAID|PARTIAL|PAID|OVERDUE), type (INVOICE|SUBSCRIPTION|...).

item.name: Flow - subscription billing (DSTV)
item.description: DSTV-style monthly MBU auto-generation. Run steps 1-6 in order after **Flow - start from scratch** steps 1-2 (customer must exist), or run step 1 here if you already have customerId in the environment.

request.description: Creates a monthly ₦6,000 subscription rule due on the 1st. Requires customerId from main flow step 2.

exec: pm.test('At least one active rule', function () {

request.description: Manual trigger for testing. Creates Jun 1 and Jul 1 MBU obligations when as_of_date is 2026-07-01.
Re-running with the same as_of_date must not create duplicate MBU rows.
Includes PAID obligations (unlike aging report). Enable status/type query params to filter.
